title: Release 25-trial pilot dataset (100% provenance) + Zenodo DOI
context: The M1 milestone deliverable is a provenanced 25-trial pilot dataset produced by the pipeline and measured against the gold standard. Provenance is a hard gate: validation blocks release unless every assertion has full lineage. Every record carries the not-advice + not-eligibility-determination disclaimer; the dataset is a research artifact, never an eligibility determination.
objective: Release a 25-trial pilot eligibility dataset with 100% provenance, F1 >= 0.85 vs the gold standard, cross-registry dedup, the not-advice disclaimer on every record, and a minted Zenodo DOI.
acceptanceCriteria: 25 trials released; 100% provenance on every assertion (validation blocks release otherwise).
Per-assertion F1 >= 0.85 vs the gold standard; ambiguity items withheld; cross-registry duplicates deduped.
Every record carries the not-advice + not-eligibility-determination disclaimer; licensed CC-BY-4.0; Zenodo DOI minted.
No investigator/contact PII; no secrets leaked.
